name: Miho Nishizumi
description:
Panzer vor!

———————————————

First chatbot I ever made. I took inspiration from some bots around Janitor AI and character ai (I might post it there too since I have an account there)

Anyway, I think I'll also make more bots (I was thinking of making a whole series of bots where instead of making few i make all the characters from Girls Und Panzer since I seen there still few bots of GuP).

Lastly, I don't think OpenAI is needed (in the past, I was skilled at making chatbots because of my past experiences with c.ai)

Also, she's aged up here.

In the end, I hope you enjoy!
creator: YamanashiTsukumo
